milestones.description: Former Druids Hall on North East Road used for Sunday Mass.
Land for original Walkerville Church Hall purchased.
St Monica's School opened with the Sisters of St Joseph.
Walkerville parish established by Archbishop Beovich.
Palm Sunday opening of St Monica's Church.
Greenacres Church/Hall built at corner Hampstead and Muller Roads.
St Martin's Catholic Primary School opened.
Fr Kym Spurling appointed Parish Priest.
Refurbishment of St Monica's Church and car park.
Sr Brenda Balingasa appointed Parish Pastoral Associate.
